'''Argus''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]-inhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Argus system/Legends|Argus system]]. When the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] was instituted, Argus's [[Celestial School of Spaceflight Engineering]] was closed down. At least one of the school's professors, [[Maggis]], became a teacher at the [[Imperial Naval Academy (Coruscant)|Imperial Naval Academy]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]], rather than be blacklisted from ever teaching again.

{{Planet-stub}}
